NAME: MESA
DESCRIPTION: Multi-Ethnic Study of Atherosclerosis: six U.S. sites with subclinical CVD imaging and omics; genome-wide data widely used in multi-ethnic GWAS and cardiometabolic genetics.
MANUAL_CITATION: Bild, D. E., Bluemke, D. A., Burke, G. L., Detrano, R., Diez Roux, A. V., Folsom, A. R., ... & Tracy, R. P. (2002). Multi-ethnic study of atherosclerosis: objectives and design. American Journal of Epidemiology, 156(9), 871-881.
PARTICIPANTS: US adults (Black, white, Hispanic/Latino, Chinese cohorts)
